2026-04-09ESDCAccessible Canada ActReappointment of a director of the Canadian Accessibility Standards Development OrganizationReappointment of Maureen Haan of Thornhill, Ontario, as a director of the Canadian Accessibility Standards Development Organization, to hold office during pleasure for a term of three years.N/A
subject: Reappointment of a director of the Canadian Accessibility Standards Development Organization
precis: Reappointment of Maureen Haan of Thornhill, Ontario, as a director of the Canadian Accessibility Standards Development Organization, to hold office during pleasure for a term of three years.
